name: Proposal Engagement
summary: Scores a user's impact through proposals by rewarding funded, concluded work with strong community ratings and penalizing unfunded or low-rated proposals. Uses time decay so recent activity matters more.
description:
**How it works:**
- Each proposal gets a **community rating** (1–5), normalized to **0..1**.
- If a proposal is **funded & concluded**, it adds a reward scaled by `funded_concluded_reward_weight`.
- If a proposal is **unfunded**, it adds a penalty scaled by `unfunded_penalty_weight` (stronger when rating is low).
- A **time decay** policy makes recent proposals matter more:
  - `engagement_window_months`: proposals older than this contribute 0.
  - `monthly_decay_rate_percent`: each month bucket reduces weight by this percentage.

**Inputs:**
- No manual file upload. Data is fetched from DeepFunding Portal APIs.

**Output:**
- Per-user proposal engagement score (CSV: `user_id`, `proposal_engagement`) plus an optional JSON details file with per-proposal breakdown for debugging.

inputs.label: Funded & Concluded Reward Weight
inputs.description: Reward strength for funded and concluded proposals. Higher values increase the impact of successful proposals.

inputs.label: Unfunded Penalty Weight
inputs.description: Penalty strength for unfunded proposals. Higher values penalize unfunded or low-rated proposals more.

inputs.label: Engagement Window (Months)
inputs.description: Proposals older than this many months contribute 0. Must be between 1 and 60.

inputs.label: Monthly Decay Rate (%)
inputs.description: Decay per month bucket (0 = no decay, 100 = full decay). Each month reduces proposal weight by this percentage.

outputs.label: Proposal Engagement by User
outputs.description: Per-user CSV with columns: user_id (DeepFunding user ID), proposal_engagement (numeric score).

outputs.label: Proposal Engagement Details (JSON)
outputs.description: Full per-user breakdown including per-proposal intermediate values (rewards, penalties, time weights). For debugging and auditing.
